payload.long_description: Edge-cropped close-up of a dark brown polished wooden side table showing the rectangular top, molded apron and a short squared leg with a visible lower stretcher shelf; glossy finish with minor wear and papers partially visible on the tabletop — appears close to the camera (≈0.8 m).
